context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA features fully implemented and tested. New endpoints: /api/sla/config, /api/sla/breaches, /api/sla/check, /api/leads/pool, /api/leads/pool/{id}/assign, /api/customers, /api/customers/{id}. New pages: LeadsPoolPage.jsx, CustomerMasterPage.jsx. SLA rules: 60-min first contact for new leads, 7-day -> 72h -> 72h escalation for inactive leads, 15-min CS activation call.
